training_prompt_zh: 一只小鸡在下雨天撑着一把伞，小心翼翼不让雨水淋湿它的身体
training_prompt_en: A chick was holding an umbrella on a rainy day, carefully trying to keep its body dry.

training_prompt_zh: 在一个广场中，有一个写着北门的门匾前，圣人朝着右边走，一只小鸡朝着左边走
training_prompt_en: In a square, in front of a plaque that reads North Gate in Chinese, a sage walks right, while a chick walks left.

training_prompt_zh: 在一堆有翅膀的小猪中间围着一只翅膀折断的金色小猪
training_prompt_en: Amidst a group of winged piglets, surrounds a golden pig with a broken wing.

training_prompt_zh: 在一个消消乐游戏中，有三种图案,分别为云、鹤、酒
training_prompt_en: In a match-3 game, there are three types of symbols: cloud, crane, and wine.

training_prompt_zh: 一座被涂鸦覆盖的塔
training_prompt_en: A tower covered in graffiti

training_prompt_zh: 一只骷髅鸡穿着花衣服
training_prompt_en: A skeleton chicken wearing a flowery dress

training_prompt_zh: 在一片荒芜中，小野兽正小心翼翼地浇灌或守护着它唯一一株向日葵。
training_prompt_en: In a desolate place, this little wild animal is carefully watering and protecting its only sunflower.

training_prompt_zh: 一个留着大胡子的男人给水豚们洗澡，其他水豚都依次排队等待洗澡
training_prompt_en: A bearded man was giving the capybaras a bath, and the other capybaras lined up to wait their turn.

training_prompt_zh: 两只小骷髅青蛙在交流怎么治疗伤病
training_prompt_en: Two little skeleton frogs are discussing how to treat injuries.

training_prompt_zh: 几头鲸鱼围着一个人，鲸鱼们都伸出了舌头
training_prompt_en: Several whales surrounded a person, and all the whales stuck out their tongues.

training_prompt_zh: 一只被拉长的羊和一个被拉短的匕首
training_prompt_en: A stretched-out sheep and a shortened dagger.

training_prompt_zh: 绿色的话梅正在烹饪一匹马
training_prompt_en: Green plums are cooking a horse.

training_prompt_zh: 五个留着胡子的人，其中四个在跳舞
training_prompt_en: Five bearded men, four of whom are dancing.

training_prompt_zh: 一只露出蓝色牙齿的小鸡
training_prompt_en: A chick showing its blue teeth

training_prompt_zh: 玉制作成的大蒜
training_prompt_en: Garlic made of jade

training_prompt_zh: 一只会认字的鹿，嘴里冒出几个字
training_prompt_en: A deer that can read uttered a few words.

training_prompt_zh: 一个穿着男士西装的桃子在用餐，用叉子插着一根鸡翅
training_prompt_en: A peach dressed in a men's suit is eating, with a chicken wing skewered on a fork.

training_prompt_zh: 一只蚌从它的壳里打包离家出走
training_prompt_en: A clam packed itself up from its shell and ran away from home.

training_prompt_zh: 三个佛祖头上都顶着一个梨子
training_prompt_en: Each of the three Buddhas had a pear on its head.

training_prompt_zh: 一个城堡里正在落下无数的大象
training_prompt_en: Countless elephants are falling from a castle.

training_prompt_zh: 一只戴着章鱼帽子的狸猫，帽子上有章鱼触须，狸猫表情困惑。
training_prompt_en: A raccoon dog wearing an octopus-shaped hat with tentacles, looking confused.

training_prompt_zh: 一只金色的豹子正在招手，周围散落着金币和元宝，背景是明亮的财神主题装饰。
training_prompt_en: A golden leopard is waving, surrounded by scattered gold coins and ingots, with a bright God of Wealth themed background.

training_prompt_zh: 一只可爱的甜虾站在领奖台上，举着金色的第一名奖牌，周围有欢呼的海洋生物观众。
training_prompt_en: A cute sweet shrimp stands on a podium, holding a golden first-place medal, surrounded by cheering marine life audience.

training_prompt_zh: 八种新鲜海鲜在沸腾的火锅海洋中游泳，周围冒着热气
training_prompt_en: Eight kinds of fresh seafood swimming in a boiling hot pot ocean, surrounded by steam

training_prompt_zh: 一把菜刀上涂满了油，刀锋上挂着一条小鱼，背景是厨房的切菜板。
training_prompt_en: A kitchen knife coated with oil, with a small fish hanging from the blade, set against a cutting board in the background.

training_prompt_zh: 一颗水晶心脏在跳动，旁边悬挂着几条肉条，背景简洁明亮
training_prompt_en: A crystal heart beating with several meat strips hanging nearby, set against a bright, clean background

training_prompt_zh: 许多张开的嘴巴，每个嘴里都含着一个杯子，整齐排列成一行。
training_prompt_en: Many open mouths, each holding a cup, neatly arranged in a row.

training_prompt_zh: 一只可爱的熊抱着一根橙色的竹子，表情自信满足，背景简洁明亮。
training_prompt_en: A cute bear holding an orange bamboo with a confident and satisfied expression, set against a simple bright background.

training_prompt_zh: 一瓶新鲜牛奶被一群小猪团团围住，小猪们好奇地盯着牛奶瓶。
training_prompt_en: A bottle of fresh milk is surrounded by a group of little pigs, who are curiously staring at the milk bottle.

training_prompt_zh: 一个拟人化的复古木纹行李箱与一把优雅的大提琴深情相拥，身上飘着爱心。
training_prompt_en: An open box contains a guitar, and another open box holds a heart, placed side by side and snuggling together.

training_prompt_zh: 一位由纸做成的中国神仙。
training_prompt_en: A Chinese deity made of paper.

training_prompt_zh: 一百条铁链悬挂着一个巨大的秤，秤上放着一块闪亮的钢块，背景是明亮的卡通风格。
training_prompt_en: One hundred iron chains hanging a giant scale with a shiny steel block on it, in a bright cartoon style.

training_prompt_zh: 一朵白色的花正在蒸笼里蒸着一只小燕子，周围冒着热气
training_prompt_en: A white flower steaming a little swallow in a steamer, with steam rising around

training_prompt_zh: 一百根竹竿上挂满了香蕉，香蕉们聚集在一起，形成有趣的场景
training_prompt_en: One hundred bamboo poles with bananas hanging on them, all gathered together in an interesting scene

training_prompt_zh: 一个弓箭手站在钟表店前，连续射箭，每支箭都精准地击中悬挂的钟表，发出清脆响声。
training_prompt_en: An archer stands in front of a clock shop, shooting arrows that precisely hit hanging clocks, producing clear ringing sounds.

training_prompt_zh: 一个人用白色的手在砌砖建造一个小房子，周围散落着建筑工具和砖块。
training_prompt_en: A person with white hands is laying bricks to build a small house, with construction tools and bricks scattered around.

training_prompt_zh: 一匹白马快速奔跑，轻盈地跨过一条小溪，水花四溅，背景是明亮的草地。
training_prompt_en: A white horse running swiftly and lightly crossing a small stream, with splashing water, set against a bright grassy background.
